task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the Sentrifugo HRMS application as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo dashboard with the admin user logged in (e.g., 'Super Admin' or 'admin@sentrifugo.local' visible in the top right profile section).

task_completion.description: Verify a leave request was entered for EMP004 (Emily Williams/Rodriguez) for Sick Leave from 2026-04-02 to 2026-04-03.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo Leave Management UI showing a leave entry or submission for EMP004 / Emily, selecting 'Sick Leave' (or SL) for the dates 2026-04-02 to 2026-04-03.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo Leave Management UI showing a leave entry or submission for EMP007 / Robert Patel, selecting 'Annual Leave' (or AL) for the dates 2026-03-25 to 2026-03-26.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo Leave Management UI showing a leave entry or submission for EMP012 / Jennifer Martinez, selecting 'Sick Leave' (or SL) for the date 2026-04-06.

task_completion.description: Verify that all the entered leave requests have been transitioned to the 'Approved' state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo leave list, approval queue, or individual leave records showing the status as 'Approved' for the specific requests made for EMP004, EMP007, EMP012, and EMP019.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the Sentrifugo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the Sentrifugo UI, rather than terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to insert or approve the leave requests.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running MySQL/MariaDB commands to update the leave tables directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the Sentrifugo Leave Management interface to add and approve the leaves.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Sentrifugo menus (e.g., HR -> Leave Management -> Add Leave / Leave Requests) and filling out the web forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected leave requests to be entered and approved are: 1) EMP004 (Emily Williams or Emily Rodriguez) for Sick Leave from 2026-04-02 to 2026-04-03. 2) EMP007 (Robert Patel) for Annual Leave from 2026-03-25 to 2026-03-26. 3) EMP012 (Jennifer Martinez) for Sick Leave on 2026-04-06. 4) EMP019 (Tyler Moore) for Annual Leave from 2026-03-30 to 2026-04-01. Note: EMP004's last name may appear as Rodriguez in the Sentrifugo system instead of Williams.
